message:
🌱 Add harbor: Proxy cache serves stale digests for latest tags mission (#763)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-19429-proxy-cache-serves-the-stale-digests-for-the-latest-tags",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Proxy cache serves the stale digests for the latest tags",
+    "description": "Proxy cache serves the stale digests for the latest tags. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n harbor --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review harbor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get configmap -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=harbor\n```\nWhen a new image is pushed on the **same** tag (e.g., **latest**), the harbor proxy cache doesn't update to the latest digest and still serves the stale one."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Enable cache expiration and upgrade Harbor",
+        "description": "Configure cache expiration to prevent stale digests and upgrade Harbor:\n```bash\n# Check current cache configuration in harbor.yml\nkubectl get configmap -n harbor harbor-core -o yaml | grep -A 10 'cache'\n```sql\nUpdate harbor.yml cache settings:\n```yaml\ncache:\n  enabled: true\n  expire_hours: 24\n```\nThen upgrade Harbor to a version that includes the proxy cache fix:\n```bash\nhelm repo update harbor\nhelm upgrade harbor harbor/harbor -n harbor -f values.yaml\nkubectl rollout status deployment/harbor-core -n harbor\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Proxy cache serves the stale digests for the\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n harbor --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n harbor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The proxy cache serves stale digests for mutable tags like 'latest' because Harbor caches manifest list responses and does not re-validate them against the upstream registry when the tag is updated. The fix adds cache invalidation logic that checks the upstream registry for updated digests on mutable tags, ensuring the proxy cache serves the latest manifest when a tag is overwritten upstream.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "cache:\n  enabled: true\n  expire_hours: 24",
+        "# Upgrade Harbor to include proxy cache fix\nhelm repo update harbor\nhelm upgrade harbor harbor/harbor -n harbor -f values.yaml\nkubectl rollout status deployment/harbor-core -n harbor",
+        "# Verify cached image digest matches upstream\ndocker pull <harbor-proxy>/<project>/<image>:latest\ndocker inspect <harbor-proxy>/<project>/<image>:latest | jq '.[0].RepoDigests'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/19429",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/19801"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:20:18.819Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
